10566331.title: CNN Newsroom Sunday
10566331.description: Updates of the latest news from around the world.

10567480.title: CNN Special Report
10567480.description: Don Lemon reviews the most popular TV theme songs in history with Gary Portnoy of `Cheers', Christopher Knight from 'The Brady Bunch', Fran Drescher from `The Nanny', and the composer of a multitude of black TV theme songs, Kurt Farquhar.

10568461.title: Stanley Tucci: Searching for Italy
10568461.description: Stanley Tucci visits Sicily. Here, Stanley tries a salty and crunchy sensation, tastes the grapes grown in the region's unique soils, and reflects on the nature of Sicilian hospitality.

10569428.title: African Voices: Changemakers
10569428.description: An exploration of the changemakers in Africa who are coming up with innovative ways to have a positive impact on their communities.

10570307.title: Marketplace Africa
10570307.description: Offering unique insights into African market's latest information while observing the events and developments that impact the business world.

10570432.title: Quest's World of Wonder
10570432.description: Perched on the rocky cliffs above a shimmering sea are medieval ramparts, nearly perfectly intact, protecting a gem inside. Exploring the real heart and soul of Dubrovnik in Croatia.

10570532.title: Inside Africa
10570532.description: Reports on African political and social issues from host Isha Sesay and correspondents across the continent.

10571424.title: CNN Newsroom with Michael Holmes
10571424.description: Live from Atlanta, Michael Holmes presents the latest news and global events.

10572325.title: World Sport
10572325.description: Highlights and action from the world's sporting competitions.

10572379.title: CNN Newsroom with Michael Holmes
10572379.description: Live from Atlanta, Michael Holmes presents the latest news and global events.

10573378.title: CNN Newsroom with Robyn Curnow
10573378.description: Live from Atlanta, Robyn Curnow presents the latest news and global events.

10574298.title: World Sport
10574298.description: Highlights and action from the world's sporting competitions.

10574328.title: CNN Newsroom with Rosemary Church
10574328.description: Live from Atlanta, Rosemary Church brings context and clarity to the day's top stories from around the world.

10575531.title: Early Start
10575531.description: An early start with news from Ashleigh Banfield and Zoraida Sambolin.

10576492.title: New Day With John Berman and Brianna Keilar
10576492.description: John Berman and Brianna Keilar report the latest news and top stories.

10579077.title: World Sport
10579077.description: Highlights and action from the world's sporting competitions.

10579171.title: First Move With Julia Chatterley
10579171.description: A look at the big stories developing as the US markets open, anchored from the floor of the NYSE.

10580157.title: Connect the World
10580157.description: Taking the viewers on a journey across the continents.

10580289.title: World Sport
10580289.description: Highlights and action from the world's sporting competitions.

10581072.title: Connect the World
10581072.description: Taking the viewers on a journey across the continents.

10582144.title: Inside Politics
10582144.description: With veteran Washington correspondent John King in the anchor chair, `Inside Politics' focuses on the top political stories of the day with a rotating round table of top sourced reporters from CNN and from other media outlets. The half-hour program gives viewers an inside look at the stories driving Washington, directly from reporters on the ground. Prior to its revival in 2014, `Inside Politics' was first headed by Judy Woodruff, and it aired for more than 20 years on CNN before its cancellation in 2005.

10583055.title: Marketplace Africa
10583055.description: Offering unique insights into African market's latest information while observing the events and developments that impact the business world.

10583107.title: Amanpour
10583107.description: Peabody Award-winning journalist Christiane Amanpour, CNN's chief international correspondent, hosts this half-hour weeknight interview program, with each episode focusing on a newsworthy topic and featuring guests, from global leaders to heads of state and cultural icons, who are comfortable challenging conventional wisdom.

10584158.title: Hala Gorani Tonight
10584158.description: Hala Gorani breaks down the day's news, curating the stories that matter and getting into exactly why they are important.

10585143.title: Quest Means Business
10585143.description: Richard Quest and a team of correspondents analyze the facts and figures from the business world to help people earn money and spend it wisely.

10586045.title: Living Golf
10586045.description: Previewing the Olympic golf competition with a look at the history of golf in the Olympic Games. Plus, a look at Japan's unique golfing culture.

10586097.title: The Lead With Jake Tapper
10586097.description: CNN's chief Washington correspondent, Jake Tapper, hosts this hour-long weekday afternoon program, which covers all the day's top stories from around the country and the world, headlines that span politics, money, sports and popular culture. `The Lead' works to ensure that viewers are caught up on the stories that matter, often highlighting news that may have been overlooked. Prior to joining CNN, Tapper served as senior White House correspondent at ABC News.
